heart.translate: сердце, центр, суть, душа, сердцевина, ядро, любовь, чувства, сущность, мужество
mnemonic: heart [hа:т] сердце - Мое сердце к (хат-е) твоей лежит.

examples.eng: She has a generous heart.
He's not bad at heart.
examples.ru: В глубине души он не злой.

examples.eng: My heart aches for him.
examples.ru: У меня болит за него сердце.

examples.eng: My heart misgives me.
He's a good lad at heart.
examples.ru: В глубине души он парень хороший.

examples.eng: He's got a marble heart.
He aimed for the heart.
She has a heart of gold.
She knew the poem by heart.
He has a bad heart.
She is very kind at heart.
I could feel my heart pounding.
Her tears rent my heart.
examples.ru: При виде её слёз у меня разрывалось сердце.

examples.eng: Can you hear my heart beating?
My heart bleeds for him.
examples.ru: У меня за него сердце кровью обливается.

examples.eng: His hand was over his heart.
She had a sudden heart attack.
examples.ru: У неё внезапно случился сердечный приступ.

examples.eng: The news set her heart beating.
examples.ru: При этом известии у неё забилось сердце.

examples.eng: His heart was aching for her.
Something swelled up in his heart.
He has a stout heart.
He's had a minor heart op.
examples.ru: Он перенёс небольшую операцию на сердце.

examples.eng: Her heart was beating fast.
The heart has four chambers.
My heart has gone pit-a-pat.
Sorrow is gnawing at my heart.
He is a liberal of pure heart.
He must have a heart of stone.
examples.ru: Должно быть, у него каменное сердце.

examples.eng: Her grief tore at his heart.
My heart wrings with regret.
